commands.name: run
commands.description: Run a one-shot prompt or continue a session

commands.name: models
commands.description: List available models from configured providers

commands.name: load
commands.description: Load a session id for reference

commands.name: create
commands.description: Create a new empty plan record (AI generation TBD)

commands.name: add
commands.description: Add (stage) a file change to a plan (modify/create or delete)

commands.name: diff
commands.description: Show unified diffs for a plan

commands.name: apply
commands.description: Apply a plan's changes (creates backups and checks drift)

commands.name: explain-symbol
commands.description: Explain a symbol by FQN or location

commands.name: rename
commands.description: Rename a symbol and stage changes to a plan (optional)

commands.name: apply-fix
commands.description: Apply a curated Roslyn fix/transform (format, simplify-names, remove-unused-usings, sort-usings)

commands.name: call-graph
commands.description: Build a call graph (inbound/outbound) for a method

commands.name: validate-build
commands.description: Compile projects and report grouped errors
